channel.title: Artiom Kovnatsky: Portfolio & Blog
channel.description: Recent content on Artiom Kovnatsky: Portfolio & Blog

item.title: #1 The Most Advanced (Business) Marketing
item.description: [WIP] | [Work in Progress] { How to cultivate a Human by embedding your product into them before first contact. This is what we'll discuss. } 🔊 Listen to Article Your browser does not support the audio element. Duration: 30:30 Download audio ChatGPT Link 💬 Question: What's the most advanced (business) marketing? 🤖 AI Response: The most advanced business marketing today is the integration of psychology, data, and technology. Key directions:

item.title: An Introduction to "Beyond Obvious" And "Mathematical Dostoevsky" And "Satanic Chess" And "God's Mathematics"
item.description: [WIP] | [In Progress] Perhaps, reading my story (a story about my journey - “Conscious Insanity”) will make it clearer why this section appeared and how I came to pay attention and write about what is presented in it. ⚠️ Difficult topics will be raised in the dialogues. I will try to summarize each dialogue with personal recommendations where possible. ℹ️ My friend, Alexander Kubyshkin (author of the economics channel FinFak and, in my humble opinion, a world-class expert) left a friendly review of this series.

item.title: Conclusion
item.description: [WIP] | [In Progress] { “In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God.” (Gospel of John 1:1) It's time to sum up the words. That's what we'll talk about. } Since I use the word God, for those who don’t believe, so that we understand each other, I’ll introduce a working definition: Definition: God — is a phenomenon that arises when a community unites for co-creation, and each becomes who they can truly be.

item.title: #2 Modern Economy and Justice
item.description: [WIP] | [Work in Progress] { Who is the main beneficiary of the existing socio-economic system and what is their position based on? This is what we'll discuss. } 🔊 Listen to Article Your browser does not support the audio element. Duration: 30:30 Download audio Gemini 2.5 Flash Link 1 Link 2 Link 3 Link 4 💬 Question: What is the term "golden billion" and what is its origin? Please clarify: What meaning is attributed to this term?

item.title: #0 Dehumanization as a (Business) Tool
item.description: [WIP] | [In Progress] { How language shapes thinking in business and beyond. That's what we'll discuss. } 🔊 Listen to the article Your browser does not support the audio element. Duration: 30:30 Download audio History-Introduction on Saving and Using Language for Help ChatGPT 💬 Question: What happened when a group of boys got stuck in a cave in Thailand? Clarify: What led to their entrapment? How was the rescue operation conducted?

item.title: #3 Дегуманизация как (бизнес) инструмент
item.description: 💬 Вопрос: Приведи таблицу с 5 колонками (страны Европы): название приблизительно количество жителей площадь количество официальных и языков с особым статусом количество стран-соседей граничащих территориально Ранжировка по размеру и количеству жителей 🤖 Ответ ИИ: Я подготовил запрошенную таблицу. Обратите внимание на нюансы классификации языков и границ: ... 💬 Вопрос: Приведи таблицу с 5 колонками (страны Европы): название приблизительно количество жителей площадь количество официальных и языков с особым статусом количество стран-соседей граничащих территориально Ранжировка по размеру и количеству жителей

item.title: Philosophie | Φιλοσοφία | Philosophy
item.description: Hinterlasse alles, mindestens, nicht schlechter als es vor dir war. Werte Den Lehren Christi folgen (Glaube an Gott) — nicht in der Form, sondern im Wesen Mut und Tapferkeit Gegenseitig vorteilhafte Ansätze Mein Ziel ist es, „Punkte des stabilen Gleichgewichts in Systemen“ zu finden und umzusetzen. Gegenseitig vorteilhafte Lösungen sichern langfristige Stabilität und vermeiden Ungleichgewichte. Praktische Anwendbarkeit Ich bevorzuge Lösungen, die in der Praxis funktionieren, aber ich schätze auch schöne Theorie.

item.title: #0: Metaphorical Autobiography or The Bunker Stories of the Professor
item.description: Fig. 1 The Metaphorical Professor's Dwelling Truth, expressed in form (e.g., written, spoken...), ceases to be truth, including what I am writing... exceptions are usually metaphors, parables, tales, proverbs... music. After reading this, the reader will have an understanding of: who they are dealing with where I came from what my values are where I am going if we are on the same path and for how long, if yes Ω.

item.title: #1: The Boat, Kandinsky 7.0, and ChatGPT 42.0 or Value-Meaning Journeys
item.description: Truth, when expressed in form (for example, written, spoken..), ceases to be such, including what I am writing... exceptions usually include metaphors, parables, fairy tales, proverbs... music By reading this training-article, the reader: will do mental gymnastics, which may increase awareness and, consequently, bring more freedom into their thinking and, as a result, into their life periodically, it seems, the training-article is worth rereading, making notes, trying to understand the meanings expressed and the connections between them …will also have an understanding:

item.title: #7: The Image of the Future or Andrey's Journey with Baba Yaga's Magic Ball of Thread
item.description: Fig. 0 Imagine your image of the future. Ω symbolizes the end/final point; Ω is Omega, the last letter of the Greek alphabet. Questions: what “colors” can be used to paint the future why “…isms” are not a solution why hypotheses, and not “I know” From the author Earlier, the main question was raised: why and how do we interact with each other? Here, I will “paint” a possible image of the future with “colors.

item.title: Подведение итогов и путешествие "Осознанное Сумасшествие"
item.description: Ω. Подведение итогов жизненного этапа. Я искал ответы на вопросы «зачем это всё?» и «как найти внутреннюю радость и умиротворение?». Перепробовал все доступные извне источники — от общества, духовных практик и науки до культур, религий, книг и фильмов. Ни один не подходил. Я нашёл свой путь. Он не нов, но надеюсь, выбранная мной форма изложения будет понятна. Если нет, спрашивайте (контакты ниже). Чтобы прояснить «мои координаты» и путь к текущему состоянию, ниже кратко изложу свою историю.
